heading: Reporting of health insurance coverage
label: 6055 Reporting of health insurance coverage

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Every person who provides minimum essential coverage to an individual during a calendar year shall, at such time as the Secretary may prescribe, make a return described in subsection (b).

children.heading: Form and manner of return
children.label: b Form and manner of return
A
children.text: is in such form as the Secretary may prescribe, and

children.label: i
children.text: the name, address and TIN of the primary insured and the name and TIN of each other individual obtaining coverage under the policy,

children.label: ii
children.text: the dates during which such individual was covered under minimum essential coverage during the calendar year,

children.label: I
children.text: whether or not the coverage is a qualified health plan offered through an Exchange established under section 1311 of the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act, and

children.label: II
children.text: in the case of a qualified health plan, the amount (if any) of any advance payment under section 1412 of the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act of any cost-sharing reduction under section 1402 of such Act or of any premium tax credit under section 36B with respect to such coverage, and

children.label: iv
children.text: such other information as the Secretary may require.

children.label: A
children.text: the name, address, and employer identification number of the employer maintaining the plan,

children.label: B
children.text: the portion of the premium (if any) required to be paid by the employer, and

children.label: C
children.text: if the health insurance coverage is a qualified health plan in the small group market offered through an Exchange, such other information as the Secretary may require for administration of the credit under section 45R (relating to credit for employee health insurance expenses of small employers).

children.heading: Statements to be furnished to individuals with respect to whom information is reported
children.label: c Statements to be furnished to individuals with respect to whom information is reported
A
children.text: the name and address of the person required to make such return and the phone number of the information contact for such person, and

children.label: B
children.text: the information required to be shown on the return with respect to such individual.

children.heading: Time for furnishing statements
children.label: 2 Time for furnishing statements
children.text: The written statement required under paragraph (1) shall be furnished on or before January 31 of the year following the calendar year for which the return under subsection (a) was required to be made.

children.heading: Alternative manner of furnishing statements1So in original. Two pars. (3) have been enacted.1
children.label: 3 Alternative manner of furnishing statements1So in original. Two pars. (3) have been enacted.1
A
children.text: such person provides clear, conspicuous, and accessible notice (at such time and in such manner as the Secretary may provide) that any individual to whom a statement would otherwise be required to be furnished under paragraph (1) may request a copy of such statement, and

children.label: i
children.text: January 31 of the year following the calendar year for which the return under subsection (a) was required to be made, or

children.label: ii
children.text: 30 days after the date of such request.

children.heading: Electronic delivery1
children.label: 3 Electronic delivery1
children.text: An individual shall be deemed to have consented to receive the statement under this subsection in electronic form if such individual has affirmatively consented at any prior time, to the person required to make such statement, to receive such statement in electronic form. The preceding sentence shall not apply if the individual revokes such consent in writing.

children.heading: Coverage provided by governmental units
children.label: d Coverage provided by governmental units
children.text: In the case of coverage provided by any governmental unit or any agency or instrumentality thereof, the officer or employee who enters into the agreement to provide such coverage (or the person appropriately designated for purposes of this section) shall make the returns and statements required by this section.

children.heading: Minimum essential coverage
children.label: e Minimum essential coverage
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “minimum essential coverage” has the meaning given such term by section 5000A(f).
